1.1.note: all data via useDeFiData() hook only. 1.2: context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3: org filter wired — hasDefiDesk derived from globalScope.organizationIds; zeroes balances and empties protocols/routes when non-DeFi org selected. 1.4: no explicit clientIds cascade — org-level only; minor gap, not blocking. 1.5: strategyIds filter applied to trade history ledger orders. 1.6: empty organizationIds returns all data (return true path). 1.7: SWAP_TOKENS lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-swap.ts (exposed via context, not widget) — open issue for context refactor, out of scope for widget-only certification.

findings.description: isLoading prop missing from FormWidget call — no loading skeleton shown
Empty state missing when flashSteps array is empty — no user guidance shown
Unused import FLASH_OPERATION_TYPES from lib/config/services/defi.config — dead code
No clientIds-level cascade in defi-data-context — only org-level (organizationIds) filtering is wired
SWAP_TOKENS reference data lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-swap.ts instead of lib/config/ or lib/constants/
